__comment: Grafana dashboard scaffold — Epic 2 Story 2.11 (Agent Health Observability). Substituir por export completo após criação na UI Grafana (https://expressia.grafana.net) com dados reais de production. Workflow activação UI: (1) login expressia.grafana.net, (2) Dashboards → Import → upload este ficheiro, (3) seleccionar datasources Prometheus + Loki, (4) confirmar 6 painéis renderam (alguns lazy/empty até Story 2.10 T10 desbloquear OU emission RLS implementada), (5) Dashboard → Share → Export → substituir este ficheiro com export populated UID. Stack: expressia.grafana.net (eu-west-6 Ireland). Trace: Architecture §9.4 (Agent Health: latência p50/p95/p99, error rate por intent, cost €/dia, accuracy benchmark), §9.2 métricas-chave, NFR13+NFR14+NFR15. **NOTA mockable-friendly:** Queries documentadas; activação UI deferida pós-deploy via handoff (precedente Story 1.7). [DEV_DECISION D64] painéis 3+5 assumem Grafana Cloud `traces_spanmetrics` extension activa para converter span attrs em métricas Prometheus — alternativa custom OTel meter emission deferida @architect gate.
description: Expressia — Epic 2 Agent Health observability (latência pipeline AI, taxa de erro por intent, custo planner, precisão benchmark, hit rate de cache, violações RLS). Story 2.11. Trace: Architecture §9.4 + NFR13/14/15.

panels.title: Latência /api/agent/prompt (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: Latência pipeline AI completo (classifier → planner → executor). Target: p95 < 6000ms (NFR1). Alarme: p95 > 10000ms (NFR15). Trace: AC1 painel 1, Architecture §9.2 agent.latency.p95.

panels.title: Taxa de erro por intent — /api/agent/prompt
panels.description: Error rate 5xx agrupada por intent_class (attr emitido por agent.prompt.intent_class). Target: < 1% (NFR15). Alarme: > 1% em 5min. Trace: AC1 painel 2, apps/web/src/lib/agent/tracing.ts:39 (whitelist attr).

panels.title: Custo planner €/dia — top 10 households
panels.description: Custo Anthropic planner agregado por household (24h rolling). Top 10 households por consumo. Métrica derivada do span attr planner.cost_eur (packages/planner-executor/src/tracing.ts:97) via traces_spanmetrics extension. **OMISSÃO MVP:** classifier OpenAI custo (~5-10% NFR21 share) não está incluído — classifier não emite cost_eur attr. Follow-up Epic 2.x: adicionar classifier.cost_eur emission. Trace: AC1 painel 3 + PO_FIX_INLINE 4a + [DEV_DECISION D64].

panels.title: Precisão do benchmark (intent accuracy)
panels.description: Métrica OTel custom gauge agent.intent_accuracy_ratio emitida pelo harness packages/agent-bench/runner.ts (Story 2.10). Pipeline: (i) lê fixtures 200-prompts-pt-pt.jsonl expected_intents[], (ii) consome intent_classifications.intent das agent_runs, (iii) compute accuracy = matched/total em-memory, (iv) emit meter.createGauge('agent.intent_accuracy_ratio').record(accuracy). **EMPTY STATE até Story 2.10 T10 desbloquear** (Eurico decisão QA1 DPA UE Anthropic). Target: ≥ 90% (Epic 2 AC6). Alarme: < 88% (NFR15). Trace: AC1 painel 4 + PO_FIX_INLINE 3 + Architecture §9.2 agent.intent_accuracy.

defaults.noValue: Sem dados — execute benchmark Story 2.10 T10 (pnpm --filter @meu-jarvis/agent-bench run bench:real) para popular esta métrica.

panels.title: Hit rate de cache (Upstash classifier + Anthropic prompt)
panels.description: Duas séries: (a) Upstash classifier cache via attr agent.prompt.cache_hit (route.ts:325, Story 2.9 AC3); (b) Anthropic prompt cache via attr planner.cache_hit (planner-executor/tracing.ts:41, Story 2.5). Pre-condição: Grafana Cloud traces_spanmetrics extension activa OR custom OTel meter emit. Targets Epic plan: Upstash ≥ 15% pós 7d prod; Anthropic ≥ 60% horário pico. Trace: AC1 painel 5 + PO_FIX_INLINE 4b + [DEV_DECISION D64].

panels.title: Violações RLS (placeholder NIT-002-NB)
panels.description: Painel PLACEHOLDER FUTURE WORK — métrica rls.policy_violations_total Architecture §9.2 NÃO implementada no codebase actual (grep packages/ zero matches). Query LogQL assume future emission via logger.warn({ event: 'rls.policy_violation', table, query }) em error handler Drizzle. Threshold: > 0 CRITICAL (qualquer denial é incidente — NFR5). **Empty state esperado até emission implementada (NIT-002-NB).** Follow-up: Epic 2.x housekeeping ou Epic 7 Platform & Compliance. Trace: AC1 painel 6 + PO_FIX_INLINE 4c.

defaults.noValue: Sem dados — emission rls.policy_violation não implementada (NIT-002-NB Epic 2.x follow-up).

title: Expressia — Agent Health (Epic 2)
